request_payload.exposure_text: As someone who values security and order, you know how important it is to have strong domestic security measures. Recent events show that our current laws are outdated and can't protect us from modern threats. Expanding domestic security powers isn't about restricting freedoms—it's about adapting to new challenges. Look at how quickly authorities responded to the recent incidents in major cities. With updated powers, they could have prevented more harm. It's time to give our security forces the tools they need to keep us safe. #NationalSecurity #PublicSafety
